title: Addis 518007 Measuring and Mixing Jug with Handle, Transparent, 2 L
features: Ideal for measuring, mixing and holding dressings, liquids and food ingredients.
Food preparation; DIY & Hobby use - metric/ imperial measurements embossed
2 litre capacity for everyday use with Strong handle & pouring spout
100% Food & BPA Safe, Freezer, dishwasher & microwave safe - High quality plastic
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. BPA Free Ideal for measuring, mixing and holding dressings, liquids and food ingredients. Dimensions W18cm X H23.5cm X D15.2cm 2L Capacity 2 litre capacity for everyday use with strong handle & pouring spout.
